Skilled Trader Funding Program

Got the skill? We'll bring the capital.

Know how to trade but don't have money to invest? Contact us and take our assessment. Pass it, and we'll fund your account — you keep 30% of the profit, no capital risk on your end.

70%Our share
30%Trader's share
01

You reach out

Know how to trade but don't have the capital to back it? Contact us and tell us about your strategy and experience.

02

You take the test

We evaluate your trading skill with a structured assessment. It's how we make sure your strategy is ready for real capital.

03

You trade our capital

Pass the test and we fund your account. You trade, we split the profits — simple as that.

Contact UsNo trading experience? This program isn't for you — yet.

Our Services

Professional stock market research and investment advisory from Delhi.

Bull Wave Capital provides market research, investment guidance, and financial advisory services from Netaji Subhash Place, helping clients pursue disciplined wealth growth in equities and financial assets.

Stock Market Research

Actionable equity insights.

Analysis of market trends, sector performance, and individual stock behavior to help clients identify investment opportunities.

Investment Guidance

Structured advice for every horizon.

Support for short-term trading decisions and long-term portfolio planning, tailored to your goals and risk tolerance.

Financial Advisory

Practical wealth-building support.

Professional advisory services covering asset allocation, risk control, and portfolio review for disciplined investing.

Office Location

Aggarwal Millennium Tower 2,
Netaji Subhash Place

Bull Wave Capital is proudly headquartered in Netaji Subhash Place (NSP), Delhi. Our office serves investors with equity research, portfolio guidance, and strategic financial planning in a professional and client-focused environment.

Head Office

Netaji Subhash Place (NSP), Delhi

Featured Plans

Structured advisory plans forSmarter Trading & Investing

Bull Wave Capital provides professionally curated subscription plans designed for equity investors, F&O traders and long-term wealth creation through disciplined market research.

Core / Starter Plan

₹4,999 / month

Entry-level guidance for swing traders, focused on fundamentally equity opportunities.

  • 12–15 equity recommendations every month
  • Momentum-based stock selection
  • Actionable buy & sell guidance
Capital BullWaveContact
Most Popular

Elite Plan / Pro Trader

₹9,999 / month

Designed for active traders with advanced Futures & Options guidance covering Nifty and Bank Nifty.

  • Nifty & Bank Nifty F&O advisory
  • Daily market direction updates
  • Risk & reversal level guidance
Capital BullWaveContact

Elite Investor Plan

₹7,999 / month

Premium advisory for long-term investors including portfolio reviews and exclusive research reports.

  • 1-on-1 portfolio consultation
  • Premium research reports
  • Long-term wealth strategy
Capital BullWaveContact

Smart Trading Ideas

Price-action insights with support, resistance and trend analysis for smarter market decisions.

Risk Management Planning

Structured allocation and position sizing strategies to protect capital during market volatility.

Portfolio Learning Plans

Build disciplined investing habits through practical portfolio learning and continuous market education.

Intraday & Swing Support

Timely trading updates during market hours to help capture short-term opportunities confidently.

Ready to Trade with Confidence?

Join Bull Wave Capital and receive research-driven market insights, professional trading guidance, and portfolio strategies designed to help you make informed investment decisions.

Explore MarketContact Us

Why Choose Capital Bull Wave

Modern stock market research, advisory, and trading support designed for Indian markets.

Capital Bull Wave focuses on structured market research, active trading advice, and investor education to help traders and investors build confidence in equities and financial assets.

Structured Trading Plans

Offers dedicated plans for equity swing traders and derivative traders focused on Nifty / BankNifty strategies.

Risk Management Focus

Built around capital protection and smart risk planning for active retail market participants.

Investor Education

Delivers market insight updates and educational frameworks to foster disciplined trading habits.

Core benefits at a glance

  • Clear plan segmentation for equity and derivative traders.
  • Fills orders immediately at the best available current market price.
  • Displays a clear visual of liquidity levels and volume at different price points.
  • Permits opening opposing positions on the exact same financial instrument simultaneously.
  • Risk-aware trading guidance with capital protection frameworks.
  • Educational guidance to help traders adopt disciplined habits.

Platform overview

The platform is positioned as a modern stock market investment and research advisory service, with a strong focus on equity analysis, active support, and investor education.

Core Plan

Equity calls for swing and long-term investors over a 10–120 day horizon.

Elite Plan

Nifty / BankNifty derivative signals, daily trend updates, and reversal levels.

Account, fees, and fund management questions answered clearly.

Browse the most important details about trading setup, charges, deposits, and capital protection practices.
